mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INBODY_LOG (member_id, record_date, weight, muscle_mass, body_fat, img) VALUES (#{memberId}, NOW(), #{weight}, #{muscleMass}, #{bodyFat}, #{img})
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, record_date, weight, muscle_mass, body_fat, img FROM INBODY_LOG WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY record_date DESC

SELECT il.id, il.member_id, il.record_date, il.weight, il.muscle_mass, il.body_fat, il.img FROM INBODY_LOG il JOIN MEMBER m ON il.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY il.record_date DESC
